mapper.select:
SELECT TBL.ID AS id, TBL.LOG_TITLE AS logTitle, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TO_CHAR(TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logCreatedAt, TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT AS readCount, TBL.LOG_THUMBNAIL_URL AS thumbnailUrl, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TBL_LIKE WHERE TBL_LIKE.LOG_ID = TBL.ID) AS likeCount FROM TBL_LOG TBL JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBL.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBL.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID
ORDER BY likeCount DESC ORDER BY TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT DESC ORDER BY TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TBL.ID AS id, TBL.LOG_TITLE AS logTitle, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TO_CHAR(TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logCreatedAt, TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT AS readCount, TBL.LOG_THUMBNAIL_URL AS thumbnailUrl, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TBL_LIKE WHERE TBL_LIKE.LOG_ID = TBL.ID) AS likeCount FROM TBL_LOG TBL JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBL.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBL.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID WHERE LOWER(TBL.LOG_TITLE) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY likeCount DESC ORDER BY TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT DESC ORDER BY TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TBL.ID AS id, TBL.LOG_TITLE AS logTitle, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TO_CHAR(TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logCreatedAt, TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT AS readCount, TBL.LOG_THUMBNAIL_URL AS thumbnailUrl, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TBL_LIKE WHERE TBL_LIKE.LOG_ID = TBL.ID) AS likeCount FROM TBL_LOG TBL JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBL.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBL.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID WHERE TBL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TBL.LOG_DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT TBL.ID AS id, TBL.LOG_TITLE AS logTitle, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TBL.LOG_CONTENT AS logContent, TO_CHAR(TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logCreatedAt, TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT AS logReadCount, TBL.LOG_THUMBNAIL_URL AS logThumbnailUrl, TBL.LOG_STATUS AS logStatus, TBL.LOG_PROGRESS AS logProgress, TBM.ID AS memberId, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBC.ID AS categoryId, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TLL WHERE TLL.LOG_ID = TBL.ID) AS likeCount FROM TBL_LOG TBL JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBL.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBL.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID WHERE TBL.ID = #{id} AND TBL.LOG_DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_LOG SET LOG_READ_COUNT = LOG_READ_COUNT + 1 WHERE ID = #{id} AND LOG_DELETED_AT IS NULL
